data.title: US Stocks To Open On A Tentative Note As Traders Remain Cautious Ahead Of Friday's Crucial Jobs Data
data.description: U.S. stock futures were on a mixed note on Friday ahead of the crucial U.S. jobs data report after a mixed close in the previous session.

data.title: Macy's Shuts Down 66 Locations As Part Of New Chapter Strategy
data.description: Macy's revealed plans to close 66 stores as part of its "Bold New Chapter" strategy. The company aims to eliminate underperforming locations and focus on its successful stores.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Answering Key Questions About Bitcoin's Future 10 Days Before The Inauguration
data.description: Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) dip from its all-time high of $108,135 on Dec.

data.title: Dollar Heads For 6th Weekly Gain; Asia Markets Decline, Europe Mixed - Global Markets Today While Us Slept
data.description: U.S. markets closed in honor of late President Carter. Futures down due to Fed hawkishness, labor strength, and inflation worries. Asian markets mostly lower, Europe mixed. Oil and gold prices rise, dollar steady.

data.title: Intel Stock Has Fallen Over 58% In 1 Year, But Citi Maintains 'Neutral' Rating On Expected Replacement Of Pat Gelsinger In A 'Couple Of Months'
data.description: Intel Corp discussed its priorities for 2025 with Citi Research analyst Christopher Danely, which includes the appoint of a new CEO.
